caption: The scene is a forest clearing, rendered in a realistic style with a somber and mysterious tone, evoking a sense of foreboding. The ground is entirely covered by a thick, swirling mist that obscures the lower parts of the trees and creates an ethereal, unsettling atmosphere. Towering, ancient trees with gnarled branches form a dense canopy overhead, their dark forms casting deep, elongated shadows across the clearing. The faint moonlight struggles to penetrate the thick foliage, creating pockets of dim illumination that barely cut through the pervasive gloom. The tree trunks are rough and textured, covered in moss and lichen, suggesting great age. The mist itself has a subtle, luminous quality where the moonlight touches it, but otherwise remains opaque and dense. The clearing is circular, with the trees forming an unbroken perimeter around it. The mist rises uniformly from the ground, reaching approximately halfway up the tree trunks. The branches of the trees interlock above, creating a natural, vaulted ceiling that further limits the light.
